title: Warrior's Weapons
description: A custom SMP PvP weapons Resource Pack (Requires CIT Resewn or Optifine)
body:
## About
- Warrior's Weapons is a custom SMP PvP Resource Pack that comes in currently 2 colors, being blue and red. 
- It adds 5 3d name dependant item textures, but try to stick to a blocky Minecraft-like appearance.

## Item Names
- Terrorizer (Sword)
- Terrorstrike (Pickaxe)
- Beheader (Axe)
- Dreadshot (Bow)
- Totem of Chaos (Totem)
